title: Megatrends
theme: Future of work and career adaptation

overview.tagline: Navigate the big forces shaping the future of work.
overview.playerFantasy: Build a future-ready career by responding to major social, technological, environmental, and economic change.
overview.teacherValue: Introduces key megatrend concepts through scenarios, checks for understanding, typed evidence, and persistent career consequences.

learningObjectives: Explain how megatrends influence jobs, workplaces, and career opportunities.
Recognise how major forces can create both emerging and declining jobs.
Apply future-focused thinking to career decisions.
Connect learning to broader life outcomes such as income, balance, and security.

sharedStatEffects.description: Scenario choices and mini-game rewards can raise salary.
Scenario decisions accumulate earnings and influence long-term financial growth.
Future-ready decisions can improve security while risky choices can reduce it.
Trade-offs between ambition and wellbeing are represented directly.
A portion of student earnings contributes to the class community fund.

employabilityFocus.whyItFits: Students weigh options, analyse consequences, and reflect on future-facing career choices.
Branching scenarios require students to solve changing career and life problems.
Typed concept lock-in tasks can be used as evidence of terminology and meaning.

activities.title: The Four Megatrends
activities.purpose: Orient students to the four major forces shaping future work.

activities.title: Career Decision Scenario
activities.purpose: Present a meaningful choice that links megatrend knowledge to career outcomes.

activities.title: Concept Lock-In Quiz
activities.purpose: Require students to identify the key concept correctly before progressing.

activities.title: Typed Concept Sentence
activities.purpose: Capture explicit evidence that the student can state the concept accurately.

activities.title: Arcade Reward Game
activities.purpose: Provide a short reward loop that feeds back into mastery and motivation.

activities.title: Community Contribution Vote
activities.purpose: Connect individual play to collective class impact.

assessmentEvidence.prompt: Answer the concept question correctly to show understanding of the megatrend.
Type the exact sentence that explains how the megatrend affects work.
